source: decisions/01-prescription.md (research-refined 14-step order) + research/01-canonical-research.md (ADR mapping) + HANDOFF.md (live status)

steps.title: BLUEPRINT_HOME resolver
steps.rationale: Portability precondition: one resolver (env -> blueprint.yml methodology_home -> local -> npm) replaces the 29 hardcoded paths + stale hook default. Gates the CLI.

steps.title: Semver baseline (Changesets + VERSION + CHANGELOG)
steps.rationale: The version primitive the bidirectional update channel and consumer pinning depend on. package.json is the single version source.

steps.title: @nino-chavez/blueprint-cli dispatcher
steps.rationale: The npx entrypoint: thin dependency-free ESM dispatcher (init delegates to the stamper; review/upgrade/fleet/cost/doctor stubbed) + bin/lib/blueprint-home.mjs resolver. On the platform/cli branch, pending wave merge.

steps.title: First .mjs reviewer (ADR-0002 contract)
steps.rationale: Prove the review() contract runs outside Claude Code. Unblocks the skip-justification gate AND the org-plugin channel.

steps.title: Cost-dial config
steps.rationale: Per-stage effort vector (Claude Code enum) + model_tier routing. Shipped as tools/blueprint wave 35: blueprint.yml cost: block (7 provisional stage anchors) + tools/lib/cost-dial.mjs resolver (parseCostBlock/resolveCost/ANCHORS/underProcessed gate primitive; 8-assertion self-test). Dispatch-time frontmatter materialization + the blueprint cost sweep are steps 5-6.

steps.title: Telemetry + blueprint cost sweep
steps.rationale: Shipped as tools/blueprint wave 36: tools/lib/telemetry.mjs (append-only .blueprint/telemetry.jsonl writer + tolerant reader + summarizeTelemetry) and the real `blueprint cost` command (config view + telemetry sweep, --json). duration_ms is a tier-weighted TIME proxy, not dollars. Anchors stay PROVISIONAL until ~10 cycles accumulate.

steps.title: Skip-justification gate
steps.rationale: Shipped as tools/blueprint wave 36: cost-gate-reviewer (.mjs+.md, second ADR-0002 executable reviewer) reusing cost-dial.mjs. No cost: block -> PASS; below-anchor unjustified -> BLOCK; below-anchor justified -> WARN. Verified four ways via `blueprint review cost-gate-reviewer`.

steps.title: consumers.yml + blueprint fleet
steps.rationale: Shipped as tools/blueprint wave 37: a methodology-source ADR-0005 + consumers.yml registry at the source root + tools/lib/consumers-registry.mjs (two-anchor-by-pin-shape drift model: semver→package.json, sha→HEAD ancestry; no cross-shape ordering; unpinned is informational, not drift) + real `blueprint fleet [--json] [--strict]`. Real git computes blueprint-platform = behind 23 commits. Mirror-not-authoritative; no consumer clone (ceiling A). 33-assertion self-test.

steps.title: blueprint upgrade
steps.rationale: Shipped as tools/blueprint wave 38: the DOWN channel. `blueprint upgrade` is fleet-for-N=1, consumer-local — reuses classifyConsumer (now with a shared `breaking` field), narrates the CHANGELOG/commit-log delta, and bumps the pin under a plan/apply split. Safe-by-default: dirty-tree guard + major/untagged refusal (--ack-untagged) + atomic round-tripped column-0 write. v1 is pin-bump only; chrome re-stamp deferred. tools/lib/upgrade.mjs, 23-assertion self-test.

steps.title: Access + governance artifacts
steps.rationale: Shipped as tools/blueprint wave 39: CODEOWNERS (promotion authority mechanical) + main-ruleset.json + idempotent apply-ruleset.sh + CONTRIBUTING (Rust-RFC-lite on the 4-bucket taxonomy) + amendment-RFC issue form + access.roles schema. Access = the git host enforces; Blueprint carries intent (ceiling A). Binding the ruleset to the live repo is the one operator action (gh admin).

steps.title: Triage Action
steps.rationale: 4-bucket classifier on the owner-spec-lint CI skeleton; completes the UP channel.

steps.title: Native extensibility (org-authored reviewers)
steps.rationale: Convention-discovered .mjs reviewers via npm/git; state-derive loader reuse; review() is the interface.

steps.title: blueprint doctor (conformance)
steps.rationale: Trust-at-scale capstone: gates on runtime/browser verification, not curl-200 (the false-green guard).

steps.title: Enablement portal (generic harness + populate + deploy)
steps.rationale: Made template/apps/portal a genuinely generic Pattern A harness (wave 31), populated this initiative's portal, and deployed it: https://blueprint-platform.pages.dev. This roadmap renders here.
